meta.note: kt is ground truth for this scenario: the workout steps (start workout -> skip warmup -> increment weight -> log sets) are expected to reach a real, usable WorkoutExecutionScreen here, unlike scenario.py's py run which hits a 'Session not found' race (bug B14) and shows a blank execution screen from log_set_1 onward -- that divergence is the whole point of the side-by-side kt-vs-py comparison this file exists for.
